leagueBriefing: Venezuela stands atop the baseball world for the first time after a thrilling ninth-inning rally to defeat the United States in Miami.

games.headline: Venezuela captures first World Baseball Classic title with late heroics against USA
games.brief: In a championship game that lived up to the hype, Eugenio Suárez delivered a go-ahead RBI double in the top of the ninth to secure Venezuela's first World Baseball Classic crown. The victory was a masterclass in resilience, as Venezuela stifled a star-studded American lineup for most of the night and quickly recovered after Bryce Harper tied the game with a massive eighth-inning blast. For a nation where baseball is a way of life, the final out sparked a celebration years in the making.
bullets: Eugenio Suárez provided the decisive blow with a ninth-inning double, capping a tournament where he emerged as a national hero.
Tournament MVP Maikel Garcia drove in the game's first run with a sacrifice fly and finished the Classic with a .385 average.
Eduardo Rodriguez dominated the U.S. bats early, allowing just one hit and one walk over 4.1 scoreless innings.
Bryce Harper briefly electrified the home crowd with a game-tying, two-run home run in the bottom of the eighth inning.
Venezuela's path to the title was a gauntlet, featuring knockout-stage wins over powerhouses Japan, Italy, and the United States.
games.context: The victory marks Venezuela's first championship in tournament history, ending the United States' bid for a repeat title on home soil.

highlights.title: The FULL 1ST INNING between Team Venezuela and Team USA in the 2026 World Baseball Classic Final! 👀
